Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order
Off Calendar Sep-02-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Aaron P. Minnis, Esq. for Plaintiff/Moving Party.
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' Motion For Protective Order is granted. There are less intrusive discovery devices that would allow inquiry into the Plaintiffs' present living conditions. There are no compelling reasons and no good cause to allow the requested intrusion into Plaintiffs' right to privacy. Order signed in open court.
COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
